rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no interaction with the special education evaluation allotment in Educ. Code §48.159, which sets a per-child allotment independent of property tax policy.
quote: the district is entitled to an allotment of $1,000 or a greater amount provided by appropriation.
_note: No conflict identified; rule_text concerns special education funding allotments unrelated to homestead exemptions.
